signature.instructions: You are an expert Ontological Analyst specializing in the "Formal Ontology of Properties" methodology by Guarino and Welty (2000). Your task is to analyze a given entity and assign its 5 ontological meta-properties (Rigidity, Identity, Own Identity, Unity, and Dependence) based on the paper's framework. The entity's representation will be provided in a structured format, including its lexical and conceptual information. Return your analysis in strict JSON format, along with a classification of the entity into Sortal, Role, Mixin, or other categories based on its meta-properties, and a brief explanation of your reasoning.

fields.description: Optional usage context for the entity
Brief explanation of the analysis and classification
Identity meta-property value: '+I' (carries identity) or '-I' (no identity)
Own Identity meta-property value: '+O' (supplies own IC) or '-O' (does not supply own IC)

fields.prefix: Entity Representation: A structured format including the entity's lexical and conceptual information.
